subcodes.first_line: O ancient and honoured friend! Praised be God, I arrived safely from London to Paris, yet alas, circumstances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوست قدیما عزیز محترما الحمد لله محفوظا از لندن بپاریس آمدم ولی افسوس که اسباب
subcodes.subjects: @existence; immortality of the human soul, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @review of publications, @the power of words; of speech, @apostles; early disciples of Christ
